title: The Live-stock Importation Act, 1898
full_text: The Live-stock Importation Act, 1898 पशुधन आयात अधिनियम, 1898 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189809 Act Number: 09 Enactment Date: 1898-08-12 Act Year: 1898 Short Title: The Live-stock Importation Act, 1898 Hindi Title: पशुधन आयात अधिनियम, 1898 Long Title: An Act to make better provision for the regulation of the importation of live-stock and Live Stock Products Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying Enforcement Date: 12-08-1898 Last Updated: 29-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Live-stock Importation Act, 1898 Show all section Section 1. Short title and local extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to regulate importation of live-stock. Section 3A. Power to regulate Importation of live-stock products. Section 4. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 5. Protection to persons acting under Act.
